generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and community volunteer, I've always believed in being prepared. But have you considered how excessive civil defense spending actually divides our communities? Local leaders know best how to keep us safe without draining resources from schools and hospitals. Let's focus on real preparedness, not just more military budgets. #CommunityFirst #SmartSafety
